c:Datum.c:Value: {0} Locals.FreqIdx = 0; Locals.FreqIdx < (Locals.BandIdx == 0 ? Parameters.Wlan_FreqCountBand0 : Parameters.Wlan_FreqCountBand1); Locals.FreqIdx = Locals.FreqIdx + 1

tr:Test.name: Log point to CSV  aggregate pass (.NET)
